title: Fish Trophies
description: This pack lets you put fish on display the proper way. Fish will show these new models when placed in an item frame. They will appear as normal items in any other context.
body:
**This pack lets you put fish on display the proper way. Fish will show these new models when placed in an item frame. They will appear as normal items in any other context.**

---

**Tropical fish variants and other special types can be obtained by renaming them in an anvil.**

**For all available variants, see the FishNames.txt file in the pack or the gallery images.**
